caption: cyMake an application
heading: cyChoose an application
noticeText: cyYou cannot apply to suspend (stop or delay) the eviction online.

noticeTextList.readTheGuidance: cyRead the guidance explaining how to suspend the eviction (GOV.UK, opens in a new tab)
noticeTextList.fillInTheForm: cyFill in the N244a form
noticeTextList.findYourLocalCourt: cyFind your local court
noticeTextList.sendTheFormToTheCourt: cySend the completed form to the court, or deliver it by hand

question: cyWhat do you want to apply for?

adjourn.label: cyAsk to adjourn the hearing (move it to a later time or date)
adjourn.hint: cyYou can apply to change the court hearing until a later time or date

setAside.label: cyAsk the court to set aside (cancel) a decision the court has made
setAside.hint: cyYou can ask the court to set aside its order if you have good reason. For example, if you were unable to attend the court hearing because you were ill

somethingElse.label: cySomething else
somethingElse.hint: cyMake an application for something that is not listed above

errors.typeOfApplication: cyChoose what you want to apply for
